data.name: VR Naughty
data.detailed_description:
A quick, immersive sexual experience awaits you in VR Naughty!

Live your dreams with our endless selection of partners—get ready to feel your chosen companion in the palm of your hands.

FEATURES

  • Find your dream partner from a wide variety of randomly generated characters.

  • Lose yourself in immersive VR realism

  • Experience flexible controls that let you feel every thrust

  • Caress, touch, and explore every inch of your partner

  • Satisfy your kink with a wide selection of positions

Join us to awaken your desires!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: i7 7000 series
  • 記憶體: 8000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1080
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR Meta Quest 2, OpenXR Meta Quest 3
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10/11
  • 處理器: i7 7000 series
  • 記憶體: 16000 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 2070
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: OpenXR Meta Quest 2, OpenXR Meta Quest 3
